CustomField.label: Order Stage
CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(Credit_Status__c, "Rejected"), "Credit Rejected", IF(ISPICKVAL(Fulfillment_Status__c, "Cancelled"), "Cancelled", IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(Fulfillment_Status__c, "Delivered"), ISPICKVAL(Payment_Status__c, "Paid")), "Completed", IF(ISPICKVAL(Fulfillment_Status__c, "Delivered"), "Delivered - Awaiting Payment", IF(ISPICKVAL(Fulfillment_Status__c, "Shipped"), "Shipped", IF(ISPICKVAL(Fulfillment_Status__c, "In_Picking"), "In Picking", IF(ISPICKVAL(Credit_Status__c, "Pending"), "Pending Credit Approval", "New")))))))
CustomField.description: User-friendly single stage derived from the three orthogonal status fields. See ADR-0004.
